cards.back: Models used to describe the degradation of an image, such as Gaussian noise, Poisson noise, and non-linear degradation.
Theories used to recover an original image from a degraded image, such as Maximum a Posteriori (MAP) and Minimum Mean Squared Error (MMSE).
A technique used to separate mixed signals into their original sources without prior knowledge of the mixing process.
A type of BSS that uses statistical methods to separate mixed signals into independent sources.
Techniques used to remove noise from an image, such as filtering, transform domain methods, and machine learning-based methods.
